overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a drive along a rain-soaked elevated highway adjacent to a massive futuristic stadium. Flying vehicles traverse the foggy sky while ground traffic passes by, and holographic billboards line the road in a dystopian urban setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway adjacent to mega stadium

events.description: heavy rain creates spray and ripples on the wet asphalt surface
flying vehicles pass overhead through the foggy sky

agents.ego_description: cruising along the rain-slicked highway beside the stadium, observing flying traffic overhead

notable_agents.action: dark SUV driving ahead in the left lane

entered.detail: massive circular stadium structure with glass facade and exposed metal framework
yellow and black striped metal barrier with concrete base
tall modern street lamps with dual horizontal LED light bars
series of illuminated advertising screens mounted on the left fence line

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a rain-soaked elevated highway with a massive futuristic stadium dominating the right skyline. The camera moves steadily forward alongside a yellow-striped guardrail, with street lights illuminating the hazy atmosphere and flying vehicles visible overhead through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with close advertising hoardings

events.description: camera drifts right toward the advertising billboards
large green billboard fills the right side of the frame, blocking view of stadium

agents.ego_description: veering close to the right guardrail, passing inches from large advertising displays

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car overtaking on the left at high speed

entered.detail: large green advertisement with 'LIFE'S TOO SHORT TO BE SLOW' text and vehicle imagery
green advertisement with 'SWIFT' and 'CLEAN' text visible

segments.scene_description: The camera drifts rightward, bringing it extremely close to massive advertising billboards lining the highway wall. The green 'Speed' advertisement dominates the view while the stadium disappears behind the wall of advertisements, and a yellow sports car overtakes on the left.

events.description: camera returns to center lane position away from the billboards
teal sports car passes by on the left side

agents.ego_description: returning to center of the lane, continuing along the highway with moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: teal sports car with glowing undercarriage speeding past

entered.detail: massive circular stadium structure reappearing as camera moves left
illuminated advertising screens visible again on the left fence

segments.scene_description: Moving back toward the center of the highway, the stadium reappears on the right while the close-up billboards fall behind. The camera continues through the rain with moderate traffic, including a distinctive teal sports car that passes by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach with corporate and political advertisements

events.description: passing political campaign billboard for city mayor
approaching Arasaka corporate advertisement on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway past corporate billboards with moderate traffic flow

notable_agents.action: military-style truck driving ahead in the left lane

entered.detail: campaign poster reading 'VOTE GONZALEZ FOR CITY MAYOR' with patriotic stars and colors
corporate advertisement for 'ARASAKA ADVANCED SOLDIER SYSTEMS' with white text on dark background

segments.scene_description: The final stretch features prominent political and corporate advertising, including a mayoral campaign poster and the distinctive Arasaka military corporation billboard. The stadium looms closer on the right as the camera continues through the persistent rain with traffic flowing in both directions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-soaked elevated highway that shifts from a wide view of a futuristic skyline to an intimate glide past towering corporate advertisements. It begins by tracking alongside a yellow-striped guardrail with a massive stadium dominating the right skyline and flying vehicles drifting through the hazy, illuminated fog. As the camera drifts rightward, the stadium vanishes behind a wall of massive billboards, bringing the view extremely close to a green Speed advertisement while a yellow sports car overtakes on the left. The perspective then shifts back toward the center of the highway, allowing the stadium to reappear as a teal sports car passes through the persistent rain. Finally, the scene moves past prominent mayoral and Arasaka corporate posters, with the stadium looming larger on the right as traffic flows in both directions.
